justification: The title and body of the issue describe a bug in pandas' conversion from NumPy masked arrays to pandas arrays, which ignores missing values. This is inconsistent with user expectations and how pandas Series handles masked arrays.
current_state_summary: The issue has been closed, but the bug still exists in the latest version of pandas. The maintainer should validate the timeline events reviewed.

related_issues.title: BUG: DataFrame.melt silently corrupts data on var_name output-name collisions
